title: Latest News from Science Magazine
description: Keyword search result for Alerts: News Weekly Headlines -- New results matching your keyword search query (updated daily).

items.title: NSF officials break silence on how AI and quantum now drive agency grantmaking
items.description: Leaders acknowledge White House role in controversial moves

items.title: Galileo’s handwritten notes found in ancient astronomy text
items.description: Discovery sheds new light on how famed astronomer came to lead a scientific revolution

items.title: Surprising partner preference found in matings between Neanderthals and modern humans
items.description: Male Neanderthals tended to pair up with female modern humans, but whether intercourse was consensual is unclear

items.title: Head of Haiti’s new research agency determined to ‘keep a candle burning for science’
items.description: Environmental engineer Evens Emmanuel is trying to rebuild a shattered academic system

items.title: In a first, researchers film treetops glowing during thunderstorms
items.description: Glimmer sparked by electrical fields detected in nature for the first time

items.title: Moon’s ancient magnetic field may have flickered on and off
items.description: Billions of years ago, melting rocks deep inside the Moon could have led to bursts of surprisingly strong magnetism

items.title: Censorship and safety concerns cloud China’s plans to host science journalism conference
items.description: Organizers of the 2029 World Conference of Science Journalists defend Beijing meeting as opportunity to connect with Chinese scientists

items.title: U.S. science agency moves to restrict foreign scientists from its labs
items.description: Proposed rule at National Institute of Standards and Technology would limit access to a few years for international researchers and students

items.title: Birds are vanishing from tropical forests. Is another ‘silent spring’ coming?
items.description: As mysterious bird declines crop up in the Amazon and beyond, scientists suspect climate change may be to blame

items.title: Controversial citizenship question added to upcoming census test
items.description: Researchers worry question plus other changes will reduce accuracy and boost costs of 2030 count
